title: fix: warn user when localStorage quota is exceeded
author: stormdede515-eng
pr_body_excerpt: Silent failure when image attachments overflow the quota causes data loss on reload with no indication to the user.

gist.headline: No more silent drops
gist.blurb: We added a friendly heads-up when your browser's local storage gets too full from image attachments. Now you'll know exactly when it's time to clear some space.
gist.summary: Added a toast notification to warn users when image attachments exceed the browser's localStorage quota.
gist.impact: Users will now see a clear warning instead of experiencing silent data loss on reload when their local storage is full.
gist.visual_concept: The Nomnom creature looking completely stuffed and full after eating too many image files, while Polly the bee holds up a small glowing warning sign or a piece of toast.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round tan Nomnom creature looking completely stuffed and full after eating too many image files, while the cute bee mascot holds up a small glowing warning sign. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round tan Nomnom creature looking completely stuffed and full after eating too many image files, while the cute bee mascot holds up a small glowing warning sign.
